products.name: Anura
products.descriptor: Natural language human-machine interface for voice control of uncrewed systems

evidence.snippet:
**Meet Anura, the next-generation human-machine interface.**
============================================================
Anura is a next-generation human-machine interface. We pair a natural language interface with an embodied agent to bring intuitive, conversational collaboration capabilities to any uncrewed system.

unresolved_questions: Blue UAS and NDAA compliance status for Anura not disclosed on any fetched page.
Readiness classified as production based on 'Request a Quote' CTA and active integrations with Teal 2 and Skydio X2D, but no pricing or lead-time language confirmed.
